problem_title: Travel Rule message failures complicate tracking
problem_description: Failed or incomplete Travel Rule messages often remain unresolved across disconnected provider systems. Compliance teams face delayed investigations, fragmented status visibility and weak audit evidence for exception handling workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links failed and incomplete Travel Rule messages with originator, beneficiary and routing data into one case management workflow that improves tracking, status visibility and audit evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From failed Travel Rule messages to evidence
workflow_description: SFTY tracks Travel Rule message failures through exception handling, case creation, review and evidence preservation to support resolution and compliance reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, routing status, exceptions, customer and wallet data into one operational compliance workflow for VASPs and digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY track failed Travel Rule messages?
faq_2_answer: SFTY monitors message status continuously, creates cases for failed or incomplete messages, and routes them for review and resolution within structured compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve evidence for failures?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence, decision logs and case history related to Travel Rule message failures for review, inspection readiness and regulatory reporting support.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule providers, consolidating their outputs to provide a connected workflow across message routing, exception handling and case management.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above Travel Rule providers and connects their outputs into structured workflows without replacing the underlying compliance service providers.
final_title: Connect failed Travel Rule messages to cases
